living-abstract.essence: Refine pre-trained Dart toward token-conscious project conventions
living-abstract.purpose: Override LLM defaults where our style diverges from community norms
living-abstract.capacity: Naming taxonomy — aggressive private, conservative public, contextual local
SETUP/BEHAVIOR/VERIFY structure with reason params over comments
Guard clauses and early returns — happy path at top level
living-abstract.principle: dart analyze must pass - no exceptions
Every symbol costs tokens - maximize info/token
Critical behavioral tests, not coverage theater
